'''loshangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ianthine|ianthine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ianthine|ianthine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loshangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshangithi|loshangithi]] || [[word:loshangiji|loshangiji]] || [[word:loshangishi|loshangishi]] || [[word:loshangiki|loshangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshanguthuthu|loshanguthuthu]] || [[word:loshangujuju|loshangujuju]] || [[word:loshangushushu|loshangushushu]] || [[word:loshangukuku|loshangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshanguthu|loshanguthu]] || [[word:loshanguju|loshanguju]] || [[word:loshangushu|loshangushu]] || [[word:loshanguku|loshanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshangufthuf|loshangufthuf]] || [[word:loshangufjuf|loshangufjuf]] || [[word:loshangufshuf|loshangufshuf]] || [[word:loshangufkuf|loshangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshangethe|loshangethe]] || [[word:loshangeje|loshangeje]] || [[word:loshangeshe|loshangeshe]] || [[word:loshangeke|loshangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshangothotho|loshangothotho]] || [[word:loshangojojo|loshangojojo]] || [[word:loshangoshosho|loshangoshosho]] || [[word:loshangokoko|loshangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshangotho|loshangotho]] || [[word:loshangojo|loshangojo]] || [[word:loshangosho|loshangosho]] || [[word:loshangoko|loshangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshangofthof|loshangofthof]] || [[word:loshangofjof|loshangofjof]] || [[word:loshangofshof|loshangofshof]] || [[word:loshangofkof|loshangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfthĂŻf|loshangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfjĂŻf|loshangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfshĂŻf|loshangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfkĂŻf|loshangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|loshangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|loshangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|loshangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|loshangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfthĂŻf|loshangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfjĂŻf|loshangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfshĂŻf|loshangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfkĂŻf|loshangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfthĂŻf|loshangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfjĂŻf|loshangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfshĂŻf|loshangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loshangĂŻfkĂŻf|loshangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshangĂŠthĂŠ|loshangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:loshangĂŠjĂŠ|loshangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:loshangĂŠshĂŠ|loshangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:loshangĂŠkĂŠ|loshangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshangathatha|loshangathatha]] || [[word:loshangajaja|loshangajaja]] || [[word:loshangashasha|loshangashasha]] || [[word:loshangakaka|loshangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshangatha|loshangatha]] || [[word:loshangaja|loshangaja]] || [[word:loshangasha|loshangasha]] || [[word:loshangaka|loshangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshangafthaf|loshangafthaf]] || [[word:loshangafjaf|loshangafjaf]] || [[word:loshangafshaf|loshangafshaf]] || [[word:loshangafkaf|loshangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loshangasha|loshangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshangshĂ«sha|loshangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshangrosha|loshangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshangmusha|loshangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshangyasha|loshangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshangnkshĂ«sha|goloshangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshangnkrosha|goloshangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshangnkmusha|goloshangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshangnkyasha|goloshangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loshashangasha|loshashangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshashangshĂ«sha|loshashangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshashangrosha|loshashangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshashangmusha|loshashangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshashangyasha|loshashangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshashangnkshĂ«sha|goloshashangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshashangnkrosha|goloshashangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshashangnkmusha|goloshashangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshashangnkyasha|goloshashangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:leshĂŠngasha|leshĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:leshĂŠngshĂ«sha|leshĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:leshĂŠngrosha|leshĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:leshĂŠngmusha|leshĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:leshĂŠngyasha|leshĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goleshĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|goleshĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goleshĂŠngnkrosha|goleshĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goleshĂŠngnkmusha|goleshĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goleshĂŠngnkyasha|goleshĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:loshfangasha|loshfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshfangshĂ«sha|loshfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshfangrosha|loshfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshfangmusha|loshfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshfangyasha|loshfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshfangnkshĂ«sha|goloshfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshfangnkrosha|goloshfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshfangnkmusha|goloshfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshfangnkyasha|goloshfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
